## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and described clearly.
- [ ] Tests and documentation are updated when applicable.
- [ ] Validation performed is documented above.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private payloads, or personal data are included.
- [ ] Related issues are linked when available.
